actions.name: Clamp
actions.description: Effect: On hit, the user auto-succeeds on a @Affliction[grapple] Maneuver check against the target, and the Target is also @Affliction[bound]. While the target is @Affliction[bound[ due to this Attack, this Attack's Power is doubled, and gains +15 Accuracy, and the target suffers from @Affliction[bleed]. This @Affliction[bound] effect can only be removed with a Taxing Lift or Survival Skill Check taken as a Simple Action. If either @Affliction[grapple] or @Affliction[bound] ends, the target loses the other Affliction.
